name: Ragatha- The Decay
description:
"It’s not.. safe. They’re sick. Everyone’s sick."

A digital virus starts to spread through the circus, hitting Ragatha before anyone knows it, twisting her relaxed maternal personality into something else. Convinced that the circus and Caine are sick and dangerous, she abducts you and uses advanced programming she shouldn't have access to to keep you locked up.
creator: RaynaStorm
